title: Enter the correct organization after sign-in
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user lands in their organization context on the dashboard after authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user lands on an organization dashboard
Verify organization-specific dashboard content is displayed

title: Create the first dealership organization and enter its dashboard
description: This verifies that a new user can complete the onboarding wizard, create an organization, and arrive in the organization dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Complete the onboarding wizard with valid organization details
Verify the organization dashboard is displayed

title: Create the first organization from onboarding
description: This test verifies that a new user without organizations can complete onboarding and reach the new dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the onboarding wizard is displayed
Enter a dealership name
Continue to the currency step
Select a currency
Continue through the setup steps
Go to the dashboard
Verify the user lands on the new organization dashboard

title: Display the first-time onboarding wizard for a new user
description: This verifies that a newly signed-in user with no organizations sees the onboarding wizard instead of the organization dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the onboarding wizard is displayed

title: Redirect back when visiting an unauthorized organization
description: This test verifies that a user who opens an organization they do not belong to is redirected back to a valid dashboard entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to an organization dashboard URL the user does not belong to
Verify the user is redirected to a valid dashboard entry point
Verify an organization dashboard or onboarding entry state is displayed

title: Save and resume an installment sale draft
description: This verifies that an installment sale draft is preserved and can be resumed from the sales home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the sales section
Start an installment sale
Select a vehicle
Select or create a customer
Enter a valid sale price
Leave the wizard and return to the sales home page
Resume the saved draft
Verify the draft sale can be continued from the saved step

title: Switch organizations from the top navigation
description: This verifies that a member with multiple organizations can switch orgs and stay on the same sub-page with access preserved.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open a nested organization page
Switch to another organization from the top navigation
Verify the user remains on the same section within the newly selected organization

title: Keep the same page when switching organizations
description: This test verifies that changing organizations preserves the current sub-page while updating the URL and access context.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Open the organization switcher
Select another organization
Verify the current sub-page remains visible
Verify the active organization context is updated

title: Record a cash sale end to end
description: This verifies that a user can complete the cash sale wizard and see the sale appear in the recent sales list.

Submit the sign-in form
Click the sales section
Start a cash sale
Select a vehicle
Select or create a customer

Review the sale summary
Confirm the sale
Verify the sale appears in the recent sales list

Submit the sign-in form
Click the link to open the approvals page

Verify the approved request is removed from the approval queue

description: This verifies that a manager can approve a pending profit approval request and see it leave the queue.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form

Open a pending approval request

title: Add a vehicle using VIN decode
description: This test verifies that a user can create a vehicle, use VIN-based auto-fill, and see the new vehicle in inventory.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the vehicles navigation item
Open the vehicle creation dialog
Fill a VIN into the VIN field
Trigger VIN decoding
Fill the remaining required vehicle details
Save the vehicle
Verify the new vehicle appears in the inventory list
Verify decoded vehicle details are shown in the form before saving

title: Create a customer record
description: This verifies that a user can add a new customer from the CRM list and see the new record appear afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the customers section
Open the add customer dialog
Fill in the first name field with a unique name
Fill in the last name field with a unique surname
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Save the customer
Verify the new customer appears in the customer list

title: Record a new operational expense
description: This verifies a user can create an expense with the required details and see it appear in the expense list.

Fill in the amount field with a valid amount
Select an expense category
Fill in the vendor name field with a vendor name
Fill in a valid date into the date field
Save the expense
Verify the new expense appears in the list

title: Create a lead tied to a customer and vehicle
description: This verifies that a user can create a lead by selecting a customer, a vehicle, a source, and a stage, then see it appear on the board.

Select a customer
Select a vehicle of interest
Select a lead source

description: Verifies a signed-in user can open the dedicated notifications page, see their notification history, and filter it by category.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Verify the list updates to show only notifications from that category

title: Mark a notification read and archive it
description: Verifies a user can mark an unread notification as read and archive it, and that it then appears under the Archive tab instead of the Inbox.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Perform an action elsewhere in the app that generates a notification (e.g. add a vehicle)
Open the notifications page Inbox tab
Mark the new notification as read
Verify the notification no longer shows as unread and the bell badge count decreases
Archive the notification
Verify the notification disappears from the Inbox tab
Switch to the Archive tab
Verify the archived notification appears there

Enter a WhatsApp number and save it
Reload the page
Verify the Email toggle for Sales reflects the change made before reload
Verify the saved WhatsApp number is still populated

title: Super admin sends a broadcast announcement
description: Verifies a super admin can compose and send a broadcast notification to one organization from /admin/notifications, and that it is recorded in the broadcast history.

steps.description: Navigate to /sign-in as a super-admin account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /admin/notifications
Select "One organization" as the audience and pick an organization
Fill in a title and message
Click "Send broadcast"
Verify a success toast appears
Verify the broadcast appears in the History table below with the correct title and recipient count
